overridableConfigKeys.label: Event details
overridableConfigKeys.description: Long-form notes attached to the calendar invite

overridableConfigKeys.label: End time
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event end in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2026-06-01T10:00:00Z)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Event title
overridableConfigKeys.description: Title shown for the event in the recipient's calendar

overridableConfigKeys.label: Location
overridableConfigKeys.description: Physical address or meeting URL for the event

overridableConfigKeys.label: Start time
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event start in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2026-06-01T09:00:00Z)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Event form
overridableConfigKeys.description: Trait that renders the calendar event editor UI

overridableConfigKeys.label: Request body
overridableConfigKeys.description: JSON body sent with non-GET requests

overridableConfigKeys.label: API endpoint
overridableConfigKeys.description: URL path the bearer-authenticated HTTP request targets

overridableConfigKeys.label: HTTP method
overridableConfigKeys.description: HTTP verb used for the request (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Bearer token
overridableConfigKeys.description: Bearer token sent in the Authorization header

overridableConfigKeys.label: Request form
overridableConfigKeys.description: Trait that renders the bearer-token request UI

overridableConfigKeys.label: Plain-text body
overridableConfigKeys.description: Plain-text message body for clients that block HTML

overridableConfigKeys.label: HTML body
overridableConfigKeys.description: HTML-formatted version of the message body

overridableConfigKeys.label: To address
overridableConfigKeys.description: Email address the message is delivered to

overridableConfigKeys.label: Reply-to address
overridableConfigKeys.description: Address replies are routed to (may differ from sender)

overridableConfigKeys.label: From address
overridableConfigKeys.description: Verified sender address the email is sent from

overridableConfigKeys.label: Subject line
overridableConfigKeys.description: Subject header shown in the recipient's inbox

overridableConfigKeys.label: Template ID
overridableConfigKeys.description: Optional provider template ID to render the message

overridableConfigKeys.label: Composer form
overridableConfigKeys.description: Trait that renders the email composer UI

overridableConfigKeys.label: Operation
overridableConfigKeys.description: Which GitHub action to perform: get file, list commits, or create issue

overridableConfigKeys.label: Owner
overridableConfigKeys.description: GitHub user or organization that owns the repository

overridableConfigKeys.label: File path
overridableConfigKeys.description: Path within the repo for file or content operations

overridableConfigKeys.label: Branch or ref
overridableConfigKeys.description: Branch, tag, or commit SHA the operation runs against

overridableConfigKeys.label: Repository
overridableConfigKeys.description: GitHub repository name the operation targets

overridableConfigKeys.label: Operation form
overridableConfigKeys.description: Trait that renders the GitHub action UI

overridableConfigKeys.label: Max tokens
overridableConfigKeys.description: Upper bound on tokens in the model's response

overridableConfigKeys.label: Model
overridableConfigKeys.description: Specific model identifier from the chosen provider

overridableConfigKeys.label: Prompt text
overridableConfigKeys.description: Prompt sent to the model for completion

overridableConfigKeys.label: Provider
overridableConfigKeys.description: LLM vendor to call (openai, anthropic, google, etc.)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Temperature
overridableConfigKeys.description: Sampling randomness, 0.0 deterministic to 2.0 highly creative

overridableConfigKeys.label: Prompt form
overridableConfigKeys.description: Trait that renders the LLM prompt UI

overridableConfigKeys.label: Maps API key
overridableConfigKeys.description: API key for the chosen maps provider (Mapbox or Google)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Maps provider
overridableConfigKeys.description: Which mapping vendor handles geocoding requests

overridableConfigKeys.label: Geocode form
overridableConfigKeys.description: Trait that renders the address lookup UI

overridableConfigKeys.label: Identity provider
overridableConfigKeys.description: Which OAuth vendor handles sign-in (Google, GitHub, Microsoft, Okta)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Redirect URL
overridableConfigKeys.description: Callback URL the provider returns the user to after sign-in

overridableConfigKeys.label: Requested scopes
overridableConfigKeys.description: Permission scopes requested from the OAuth provider

overridableConfigKeys.label: Sign-in form
overridableConfigKeys.description: Trait that renders the OAuth provider button UI

overridableConfigKeys.label: Default printer
overridableConfigKeys.description: Name of the printer to send jobs to when none is chosen

overridableConfigKeys.label: Print form
overridableConfigKeys.description: Trait that renders the print job UI

overridableConfigKeys.label: Cache key
overridableConfigKeys.description: Redis key the operation reads, writes, or deletes

overridableConfigKeys.label: Operation
overridableConfigKeys.description: Which Redis command to run: get, set, or delete

overridableConfigKeys.label: TTL seconds
overridableConfigKeys.description: Time-to-live for the key in seconds (0 = no expiry)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Operation form
overridableConfigKeys.description: Trait that renders the Redis operation UI

overridableConfigKeys.label: Cache value
overridableConfigKeys.description: Value to store when running a set operation

overridableConfigKeys.label: Access level
overridableConfigKeys.description: Whether uploaded files are publicly readable or private

overridableConfigKeys.label: Allowed types
overridableConfigKeys.description: MIME types the upload accepts (empty list = allow all)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Bucket name
overridableConfigKeys.description: Object storage bucket files are uploaded into

overridableConfigKeys.label: Max file size
overridableConfigKeys.description: Largest accepted upload size in bytes (default 10 MB)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Upload form
overridableConfigKeys.description: Trait that renders the file picker UI

overridableConfigKeys.label: Charge amount
overridableConfigKeys.description: Amount to charge in the smallest currency unit (cents for USD)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Currency code
overridableConfigKeys.description: ISO 4217 currency code Stripe should charge in (e.g. usd, eur)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Extra metadata
overridableConfigKeys.description: Free-form key/value metadata attached to the Stripe charge

overridableConfigKeys.label: Card form
overridableConfigKeys.description: Trait that renders the Stripe Elements card UI

overridableConfigKeys.label: Message body
overridableConfigKeys.description: Text content Twilio should deliver to the recipient

overridableConfigKeys.label: Channel
overridableConfigKeys.description: Twilio delivery channel: SMS, voice call, or WhatsApp

overridableConfigKeys.label: Recipient phone
overridableConfigKeys.description: Destination phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +14155551234)

overridableConfigKeys.label: From number
overridableConfigKeys.description: Twilio number or sender ID the message is sent from

overridableConfigKeys.label: Composer form
overridableConfigKeys.description: Trait that renders the Twilio message composer UI

overridableConfigKeys.label: Autoplay
overridableConfigKeys.description: Start playback automatically when the embed loads

overridableConfigKeys.label: Show controls
overridableConfigKeys.description: Display the YouTube player controls overlay

overridableConfigKeys.label: Start at seconds
overridableConfigKeys.description: Number of seconds to skip in before playback begins

overridableConfigKeys.label: Player skin
overridableConfigKeys.description: Trait that replaces the default YouTube embed surface

overridableConfigKeys.label: YouTube video ID
overridableConfigKeys.description: Eleven-character YouTube ID from the share URL
